introSection: Shredder is a steel spinning indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. It is surrounded by TMNT Shellraiser and opened on November 2, 2019 as the tallest free-spinning roller coaster. The ride is themed to Shredder, the arch-nemesis of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles.
fullText: Shredder is a steel spinning indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe American Dream in East Rutherford, New Jersey, USA. It is surrounded by TMNT Shellraiser and opened on November 2, 2019 as the tallest free-spinning roller coaster. The ride is themed to Shredder, the arch-nemesis of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles.
